prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Closeout photos for Conductor selection & sizing show the installed work following the referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, and terminations shown for this element are in place, and the inspection card has no open correction note. Reference material on hand: NEC 310, Table 310.16.
title: Compliance check: Conductor selection & sizing (industrial site)
